exclusions.reason: basicConstraints bypass in certificate chain verification — transitive via expo > @expo/cli, not doing custom certificate verification
minimatch ReDoS: nested *() extglobs generate catastrophically backtracking regular expressions. Transitive dependency; tracked alongside the 42 existing allowlisted advisories on this repo.
Uncontrolled recursion in XML serialization leads to DoS — transitive via expo > @expo/plist, not processing untrusted XML
JavaScript injection via AST type confusion — transitive via ts-jest and standard-version, devDeps only; handlebars 4.7.8 is latest with no patch available
ReDoS via multiple route parameters — transitive via @lhci/cli > express, expo-atlas > express, serve > serve-handler; devDeps only, not in production runtime
JavaScript injection via AST type confusion (@partial-block) — transitive via ts-jest and standard-version > conventional-changelog, devDeps only, no untrusted template input
minimatch has a ReDoS via repeated wildcards with non-matching literal in pattern. Transitive dependency; tracked alongside the 42 existing allowlisted advisories on this repo.
DoS via infinite loop in BigInteger.modInverse() — transitive via expo > @expo/cli, devDep only

Incomplete CRLF injection protection allows arbitrary FTP command execution via credentials and MKD commands — devDep only via @lhci/cli > proxy-agent > pac-proxy-agent > get-uri > basic-ftp, no FTP usage in production code
minimatch has ReDoS: matchOne() combinatorial backtracking via multiple non-adjacent GLOBSTAR segments. Transitive dependency; tracked alongside the 42 existing allowlisted advisories on this repo.

fast-xml-parser affected by numeric entity expansion bypassing all entity expansion limits (incomplete fix for CVE-2026-26278). Transitive dependency; tracked alongside the 42 existing allowlisted advisories on this repo.
DoS via malformed decorator syntax — transitive via ts-jest and standard-version, devDeps only

FTP command injection via CRLF — devDep only via @lhci/cli > proxy-agent > pac-proxy-agent > get-uri, no FTP usage in production code. Placed in local (not config) because lisa postinstall overwrites audit.ignore.config.json from the template, which does not yet include this exclusion.
XML injection through unvalidated DocumentType serialization — transitive via expo > @expo/plist, not processing untrusted XML
XML node injection through unvalidated comment serialization — transitive via expo > @expo/plist, not processing untrusted XML
tmp has Path Traversal via unsanitized prefix/postfix that enables directory escape. Transitive dependency; tracked alongside the 42 existing allowlisted advisories on this repo.
